title: Settings Prompt Input Redesign

selectedOption.summary: 以方案 B 的操作型工作台为基础，合并方案 A 的安静顶部导航和方案 C 的显性错误状态处理。
selectedOption.decisionNotes: 用户选择 B 的效率结构、A 的低干扰周边节奏，以及 C 的清晰错误恢复。

surfaceEvidence: 用户描述 /settings prompt input component
代码推断，用户确认前标注为未视觉验证

keep: Existing settings page route and navigation
Existing submit logic and component API
Existing product tokens and icon set
Existing data flow for saved prompt content
change: Local density and helper text placement
avoid: Do not add permissions, API behavior, or database schema
Do not invent real team prompt data
Do not use rounded cards with colored side borders as emphasis

screens.description: 设置页内的默认提示词编辑器
screens.composition: Quiet topbar, template rail, central editor, right preview/status panel
screens.hierarchy: Editor title and textarea first, validation preview second, templates third

screens.description: 提示词内容不足时的验证错误状态
screens.composition: Error message appears near the editor and preview panel without moving the page shell
screens.hierarchy: Error text is visible but does not override the primary edit action

states.name: default
states.expectation: Prompt editor is ready, helper copy states that example content is placeholder if no real data exists.

states.name: error
states.expectation: Validation error is explicit, close to the editor, and reachable by screen readers.

states.name: success
states.expectation: Saved state confirms scope without inventing downstream workflow.

states.name: long-text
states.expectation: Long prompt content can scroll or resize without overflowing controls.

interactions.result: Preview/status panel updates to show validation result.
interactions.accessibility: Status text is adjacent to the editor and should be announced or reachable.

interactions.trigger: Keyboard focus enters textarea and actions
interactions.result: Focus-visible outline is clear and does not rely only on color.
interactions.accessibility: Textarea has an accessible label and buttons use action labels.

rules: Map background, surface, ink, muted, accent, border, success, and error to existing tokens.
Do not introduce a new color system for this component.
Use existing icon set if icons are needed.

responsive.rule: Three-column console may be used when width supports it; editor remains the main column.
Templates and preview can stack below editor without losing state visibility.
Single-column layout, no text overflow, actions remain reachable without hover.

motion.name: state-feedback
motion.rule: Use low-presence transitions for validation status only.
motion.reducedMotion: Status changes must remain clear with no animation.

assets.name: icons
assets.rule: Use one icon style and size if icons are added; icons are optional in MVP.

acceptanceRules.rule: Implementation follows selected B+A+C composition and preserves existing route, logic, component API, tokens, and data flow.
No invented data, lorem copy, fake controls, placeholder imagery, or rounded-card plus colored-left-border emphasis.
Default, error, success, long-text, keyboard focus, and mobile layouts are tested.
